rationale: Both candidates independently verified the same mechanism (seed removal restores the batched-multinomial fast path) with grounded references to serving_speech.py and gpu_model_runner.py, and neither surfaces the ground truth's only substantive ask (spin out VoxCPM2 fix), so recall and base precision are comparable. Y goes further with a genuinely useful grounded observation (stage 1's seed removal is inert since it's greedy/temperature=0) and gives concrete, file/line-anchored actionable suggestions (guard comment at yaml:60/90, test-coverage note), whereas X's review is just a verification narrative ending in a bare APPROVE with no concrete suggestions. Ground truth itself is thin (LGTM + out-of-scope ask), capping how much recall differentiates the two.
